# Windsurf IDE - Feature Announcements & New Capabilities

## New Features & Capabilities

1. **Cascade Agent** - "Your agentic chatbot that can collaborate with you like never before." An AI-powered assistant integrated into the IDE for code writing and project generation.

2. **MCP (Model Context Protocol) Servers** - Extensibility feature allowing servers to "extend the agent's capabilities" beyond base functionality.

3. **Memories & Rules System** - Customization feature where "Memories and rules help customize behavior" of the AI assistant.

4. **Context Awareness** - AI system that "instantly understands your codebase" for better code comprehension and suggestions.

5. **Workflows** - Automation capability to "automate repetitive trajectories" for increased productivity.

6. **App Deploys** - One-click deployment feature enabling users to "deploy applications in one click."

7. **Terminal Enhancement** - "An upgraded Terminal experience" integrated into the IDE.

8. **Custom App Icons (Beta)** - Available for Mac OS, allowing paid users to personalize Windsurf's dock appearance.

9. **Windsurf Next** - Prerelease version providing early access to unreleased features and capabilities.

10. **Import Functionality** - Settings and extensions migration from VS Code or Cursor into Windsurf.

11. **Remote Development** - Support for SSH connections and local dev container integration.

12. **Adaptive Model Router** - Intelligent model routing that selects the best model for each task.

## Last Fetched
2026-04-12 - No major new capabilities detected from previous fetch (docs overview page unchanged).
